functions:
## Instance methods
name | params | desc
--- | --- | ---
`toPascalCase` | `string` | Converts a string to `PascalCase` format.
`toCamelCase` | `string` | Converts a string to `camelCase` format.
`toSnakeCase` | `string` | Converts a string to `snake_case` format.
`toKebabCase` | `string` | Converts a string to `kebab-case` format.
`toFlatCase` | `string` | Converts a string to `flatcase` format.
`toUpperFlatCase` | `string` | Converts a string to `UPPERFLATCASE` format.
`toPascalSnakeCase` | `string` | Converts a string to `Pascal_Snake_Case` format.
`toCamelSnakeCase` | `string` | Converts a string to `camel_Snake_case` format.
`toScreamingSnakeCase` | `string` | Converts a string to `SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE` format.
`toTrainCase` | `string` | Converts a string to `Train-Case` format.
`toCobolCase` | `string` | Converts a string to `COBOL-CASE` format.
`toTitleCase` | `string` | Converts a string to `Title Case` format.
`stringifyDatetimeLocal` | `date` | Converts a Date object to a string in the format `YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm`.
`stringifyDate` | `date` | Converts a Date object to a string in the format `YYYY-MM-DD`.
`stringifyYear` | `date` | Converts a Date object to a string of the year.
`stringifyMonth` | `date` | Converts a Date object to a string in the format `YYYY-MM`.
`stringifyTime` | `date` | Converts a Date object to a string in the format `HH:mm`.
`stringifyWeek` | `date` | Converts a Date object to a string in the format `YYYY-Www`.
`parseDatetimeLocal` | `datetimeLocal` | Parses a datetime-local string into a Date object.
`parseDate` | `dateString` | Parses a date string in the format `YYYY-MM-DD` into a Date object.
`parseYear` | `yearString` | Parses a year string in the format `YYYY` into a Date object.
`parseMonth` | `monthString` | Parses a month string in the format `YYYY-MM` into a Date object.
`parseTime` | `timeString` | Parses a time string in the format `HH:mm` into a Date object.
`parseWeek` | `weekStr` | Parses a week string in the format `YYYY-WW` into the start of the week as a Date object.
`hexToRgba` | `hex` | Converts a `hexadecimal` color string `to` an `RGBA` object.
`hexToHsla` | `hex` | Converts a `hexadecimal` color string `to` an `HSLA` object.
`hslaToRgba` | `h`,`s`,`l`,`a` | Converts `HSLA` values `to` `RGBA` values.
`rgbaToHex` | `r`,`g`,`b`,`a` | Converts `RGBA` values `to` a `hexadecimal` color string.
`hslaToHex` | `h`,`s`,`l`,`a` | Converts `HSLA` values `to` a `hexadecimal` color string.
`rgbaToHsla` | `r`,`g`,`b`,`a` | Converts `RGBA` values `to` `HSLA` values.
`isValidHexColor` | `color` | Checks if a string is a valid `hexadecimal` color.
`isObject` | `obj` | Checks if a value is an `object` (excluding null).
`isArrayString` | `str` | Checks if a string represents an array (in string representation).
`isDefined` | `value` | Checks if a value is defined and not null.
`calcPercentage` | `min`,`max`,`value` | Calculates the percentage value relative to a minimum and maximum range.
`calcDecimal` | `min`,`max`,`value` | Calculates the decimal value relative to a minimum and maximum range.
`createQueue` |  | Creates a queue mechanism using Promises where each `callback` executes in sequence.
attribute-observer:
# MDAttributeObserver
MDAttributeObserver observes changes to a specified attribute of a target element
and triggers a callback whenever the attribute's value changes.

## Constructor
Creates an instance of MDAttributeObserver.

name | type | desc
--- | --- | --- 
`callback` | `function` | The callback function to be called when the attribute changes.



## Instance methods
name | params | desc
--- | --- | ---
`observe` | `target`,`attributeName` | Begins observing changes to the specified attribute of the target element.
badge:
# MDBadgeComponent
The `MDBadgeComponent` interface represents a `<md-badge>` element in the DOM. MDBadgeComponent is a custom element that represents a badge component
for displaying labels or counts with an optional limit.

## Inheritance
`MDComponent`

## Examples

```
<md-badge label=""></md-badge>
```


## Instance properties
This interface also inherits properties from its parent, `MDComponent`. Defines the properties of the MDBadgeComponent.

name | type | desc
--- | --- | ---
`label` | `Number` | The numeric label to display inside the badge.
`limit` | `Number` | The maximum number to display before showing "999+".

The `MDBottomAppBarComponent` interface represents a `<md-bottom-app-bar>` element in the DOM. {{description}}

## Inheritance
`MDSheetComponent`
bottom-sheet:
# MDBottomSheetComponent
The `MDBottomSheetComponent` interface represents a `<md-bottom-sheet>` element in the DOM. Represents a bottom sheet component that extends MDSheetComponent.

## Inheritance
`MDSheetComponent`
button:
# MDButtonComponent
The `MDButtonComponent` interface represents a `<md-button>` element in the DOM. A custom element for creating various styles of buttons with optional ripple effects.

## Inheritance
`MDComponent`


## Instance properties
This interface also inherits properties from its parent, `MDComponent`. Defines the properties of the element.

name | type | desc
--- | --- | ---
`variant` | `String` | The style variant of the button (e.g., "elevated", "filled", "tonal", "outlined", "icon-right").
`type` | `String` | The type attribute of the button element (default is "button").
`icon` | `String` | The icon to display within the button.
`label` | `String` | The label text to display within the button.
`selected` | `Boolean` | Indicates whether the button is selected.
`disabled` | `Boolean` | Indicates whether the button is disabled.
card:
# MDCardComponent
The `MDCardComponent` interface represents a `<md-card>` element in the DOM. A custom element representing a card with various interactive elements and actions.

## Inheritance
`MDComponent`

## Events
Listen to these events using `addEventListener()`, or by assigning an event listener to the `@onEventName` property of this interface.

name | desc
--- | ---
`onCardIconButtonClick` | Event fired when an icon button in the card is clicked.
`onCardIconClick` | Event fired when an icon in the card is clicked.
`onCardButtonClick` | Event fired when a button in the card is clicked.
`onCardFabClick` | Event fired when a FAB (Floating Action Button) in the card is clicked.
`onCardTextFieldNativeFocus` | Event fired when a native text field in the card receives focus.
`onCardTextFieldNativeBlur` | Event fired when a native text field in the card loses focus.
`onCardTextFieldNativeInput` | Event fired when input occurs in a native text field in the card.
`onCardTextFieldNativeSearch` | Event fired when a search action occurs in a native text field in the card.
`onCardTextFieldNativeInvalid` | Event fired when a native text field in the card is invalid.
`onCardTextFieldNativeReset` | Event fired when a reset action occurs in a native text field in the card.
`onCardTextFieldIconButtonClick` | Event fired when an icon button in a text field in the card is clicked.
`onCardPaginationChange` | Event fired when pagination in the card changes.
`onCardPaginationLimitChange` | Event fired when pagination limit in the card changes.
`onCardPaginationFirstClick` | Event fired when the first page button in pagination in the card is clicked.
`onCardPaginationPrevClick` | Event fired when the previous page button in pagination in the card is clicked.
`onCardPaginationNextClick` | Event fired when the next page button in pagination in the card is clicked.
`onCardPaginationLastClick` | Event fired when the last page button in pagination in the card is clicked.


## Instance properties
This interface also inherits properties from its parent, `MDComponent`. Defines the properties of the card element.

name | type | desc
--- | --- | ---
`variant` | `String` | The variant style of the card (e.g., "elevated", "filled", "outlined").
`leadingActions` | `Array` | An array of leading actions (e.g., icon buttons) in the card.
`label` | `String` | The primary label text of the card.
`subLabel` | `String` | The secondary label text of the card.
`trailingActions` | `Array` | An array of trailing actions (e.g., icon buttons) in the card.
`actions` | `Array` | An array of general actions (e.g., buttons, FABs) in the card footer.

name | params | desc
--- | --- | ---
`setTheme` | `colorOrImage`,`customColors` | Sets the theme of the application based on a color or image.

gesture:
# MDGestureController
MDGestureController manages gesture events like drag, resize, selection, taps, double taps, long presses, and swipes.

## Constructor
Creates an instance of MDGestureController.

name | type | desc
--- | --- | --- 
`host` | `HTMLElement` | The host element to attach gesture events to.
`options` | `Object` | Options for configuring gesture behavior.
`options.containerSelector` | `string` | Selector for the container element within the host.
`options.dragHandleSelector` | `string` | Selector for the drag handle element within the container.
`options.drag` | `Array.<string>` | Directions in which dragging is allowed ('x', 'y', or both).
`options.dragAfterLongPress` | `boolean` | Whether dragging should start after a long press.
`options.resize` | `Array.<string>` | Directions in which resizing is allowed ('n', 'e', 's', 'w', 'ne', 'se', 'sw', 'nw').
`options.resizeAfterLongPress` | `boolean` | Whether resizing should start after a long press.
`options.selection` | `boolean` | Whether selection is enabled.
`options.selectionAfterLongPress` | `boolean` | Whether selection should start after a long press.
`options.updateStyle` | `boolean` | Whether to update the element style during gestures.

## Events
Listen to these events using `addEventListener()`, or by assigning an event listener to the `@onEventName` property of this interface.

name | desc
--- | ---
`onDragStart` | Event fired when drag starts.
`onResizeStart` | Event fired when resize starts.
`onSelectionStart` | Event fired when selection starts.
`onLongPress` | Event fired on long press.
`onDrag` | Event fired during drag.
`onResize` | Event fired during resize.
`onSelection` | Event fired during selection.
`onTap` | Event fired on tap.
`onDoubleTap` | Event fired on double tap.
`onSwipeLeft` | Event fired on swipe left.
`onSwipeRight` | Event fired on swipe right.
`onSwipeTop` | Event fired on swipe top.
`onSwipeBottom` | Event fired on swipe bottom.
`onSelectionEnd` | Event fired when selection ends.
`onDragEnd` | Event fired when drag ends.
`onResizeEnd` | Event fired when resize ends.

icon-button:
# MDIconButtonComponent
The `MDIconButtonComponent` interface represents a `<md-icon-button>` element in the DOM. A custom element for creating icon buttons with various styles and ripple effects.

## Inheritance
`MDComponent`

## Events
Listen to these events using `addEventListener()`, or by assigning an event listener to the `@onEventName` property of this interface.

name | desc
--- | ---
`onIconButtonClick` | Event fired when the icon button is clicked.


## Instance properties
This interface also inherits properties from its parent, `MDComponent`. Defines the properties of the element.

name | type | desc
--- | --- | ---
`variant` | `String` | The style variant of the icon button (e.g., "filled", "tonal", "outlined", "toggle").
`icon` | `String` | The icon to display within the button.
`selected` | `Boolean` | Indicates whether the button is selected (for toggle buttons).
`disabled` | `Boolean` | Indicates whether the button is disabled.

The `MDMarkdownComponent` interface represents a `<md-markdown>` element in the DOM. A custom element for rendering Markdown content.

## Inheritance

## Instance properties
This interface also inherits properties from its parent, `MDComponent`. Defines the properties of the element.

name | type | desc

menu:
# MDMenuComponent
The `MDMenuComponent` interface represents a `<md-menu>` element in the DOM. MDMenuComponent is a custom element that represents a menu component
with integrated virtual scrolling and popper positioning.

## Inheritance
`MDSheetComponent`

## Events
Listen to these events using `addEventListener()`, or by assigning an event listener to the `@onEventName` property of this interface.

name | desc
--- | ---
`onMenuViewportVirtualScroll` | Fired when the virtual scroll position changes.
`onMenuListItemClick` | Fired when a list item in the menu is clicked.


## Instance properties
This interface also inherits properties from its parent, `MDSheetComponent`. Defines the properties of the MDMenuComponent, merging properties
from MDSheetComponent and MDListComponent.

name | type | desc
--- | --- | ---
`rowHeight` | `Number` | The height of each row in the virtual list.
`maxRows` | `Number` | The maximum number of rows to display in the menu.
`menuList` | `ReadOnly` | Gets the menu list element.
`body` | `ReadOnly` | Gets the HTML content of the menu's body, which includes a virtual list component.
`body` | `ReadOnly` | Sets the HTML content of the menu's body.
`selectedIndex` | `ReadOnly` | Gets the index of the currently selected item in the menu list.
`selectedList` | `ReadOnly` | Gets the list of selected items in the menu list.

## Instance methods
This interface also inherits methods from its parent, `MDSheetComponent`.

name | params | desc
--- | --- | ---
`filter` | `value` | Applies a filter to the menu list based on the provided value.
`showModal` | `button`,`options` | Displays the menu as a modal, setting its placement relative to the button.
`show` | `button`,`options` | Displays the menu, setting its placement relative to the button.
observer:
# MDObserver
MDObserver observes media queries and triggers a callback when a matching query is found.

## Constructor
Creates an instance of MDObserver.

name | type | desc
--- | --- | --- 
`callback` | `function` | The callback function to be called when a media query matches.


## Instance methods
name | params | desc
--- | --- | ---
`observe` | `list` | Observes a list of media query configurations and triggers the callback when a matching query is found.
popper:
# MDPopperController
Provides a controller for managing popper-like behavior on elements.

## Constructor
Initializes the popper controller for a host element.

name | type | desc
--- | --- | --- 
`host` | `HTMLElement` | Host element to apply popper behavior.
`options` | `Object` | Configuration options for the popper behavior.
`options.placements` | `Array.<string>` | List of possible placements for the popper.
`options.boundary` | `HTMLElement` | Boundary element for the popper positioning.
`options.offset` | `number` | Offset value for the popper position.



## Instance methods
name | params | desc
--- | --- | ---
`setPlacement` | `button`,`options` | Sets the placement of the popper relative to a button element.
`getRect` | `button` | Retrieves the bounding rectangle of an element.
progress:
## Instance properties
name | type | desc
--- | --- | ---
`requestId` | `ReadOnly` | Represents a controller for managing a progress indicator.

## Instance methods
name | params | desc
--- | --- | ---
`create` |  | Creates a new progress indicator element and appends it to the document body.
`reset` |  | Resets the progress indicator and animation state.
`observe` | `resolve` | Observes the progress of the animation.
`start` | `duration` | Starts the progress animation with a specified duration.
`pause` |  | Pauses the current animation.
`resume` |  | Resumes a paused animation.
`stop` |  | Stops the current animation and resets the progress indicator.
ripple:
# MDRippleController
Provides a controller for adding ripple effects to elements.

## Constructor
Initializes the ripple controller for a host element.

name | type | desc
--- | --- | --- 
`host` | `HTMLElement` | Host element to apply ripple effect.
`options` | `Object` | Configuration options for the ripple effect.
`options.buttonSelector` | `string` | Selector for the button element within the host.
`options.centered` | `boolean` | Whether the ripple effect should be centered.
`options.clipped` | `boolean` | Whether the ripple effect should be clipped.
`options.containerSelector` | `string` | Selector for the container element within the host.
`options.fadeOut` | `boolean` | Whether the ripple effect should fade out.
`options.size` | `number` | Size of the ripple effect relative to the container.
router:
# MDRouter
Manages routing within a single-page application.

## Events
Listen to these events using `addEventListener()`, or by assigning an event listener to the `@onEventName` property of this interface.

name | desc
--- | ---
`onRouterCurrentEntryChange` | Event emitted when current route changes.
`onRouterNavigate` | Event emitted before navigating to a new route.
`onRouterNavigateError` | Event emitted if an error occurs during navigation.
`onRouterNavigateSuccess` | Event emitted after successful navigation.


## Instance methods
name | params | desc
--- | --- | ---
`navigate` | `url` | Navigates to a new URL using either History API or hash-based routing.
`init` | `routes` | Initializes the router with the provided routes configuration.

## Instance properties
name | type | desc
--- | --- | ---
`historyApiFallback` | `ReadOnly` | Indicates whether to use the History API for routing (default: true).
scrim:
# MDScrimComponent
The `MDScrimComponent` interface represents a `<md-scrim>` element in the DOM. Represents a scrim component that extends MDComponent.

## Inheritance
`MDComponent`


## Instance properties
This interface also inherits properties from its parent, `MDComponent`. Properties of the MDScrimComponent.

name | type | desc
--- | --- | ---
`open` | `Boolean` | Reflects whether the scrim is open.

## Instance methods
This interface also inherits methods from its parent, `MDComponent`.

name | params | desc
--- | --- | ---
`show` |  | Shows the scrim by setting `open` to true.
`close` |  | Hides the scrim by setting `open` to false.
`toggle` |  | Toggles the scrim visibility.
segmented-button:
# MDSegmentedButtonComponent
The `MDSegmentedButtonComponent` interface represents a `<md-segmented-button>` element in the DOM. Represents a segmented button component that allows single or multiple selection of its items.

## Inheritance
`MDComponent`

## Events
Listen to these events using `addEventListener()`, or by assigning an event listener to the `@onEventName` property of this interface.

name | desc
--- | ---
`onSegmentedButtonItemClick` | Triggered when a segmented button item is clicked.


## Instance properties
This interface also inherits properties from its parent, `MDComponent`. undefined

name | type | desc
--- | --- | ---
`buttons` | `Array` | Array of button items to render.
`singleSelection` | `Boolean` | Indicates single selection mode.
`multiSelection` | `Boolean` | Indicates multiple selection mode.
sheet:
# MDSheetComponent
The `MDSheetComponent` interface represents a `<md-sheet>` element in the DOM. Represents a sheet component that extends MDCardComponent.

## Inheritance
`MDCardComponent`

## Events
Listen to these events using `addEventListener()`, or by assigning an event listener to the `@onEventName` property of this interface.

name | desc
--- | ---
`onSheetScrimClick` | Triggered when the sheet scrim is clicked.
`onSheetShow` | Triggered when the sheet is shown.
`onSheetClose` | Triggered when the sheet is closed.


## Instance properties
This interface also inherits properties from its parent, `MDCardComponent`. Properties of the MDSheetComponent.

name | type | desc
--- | --- | ---
`open` | `Boolean` | Reflects whether the sheet is open.

## Instance methods
This interface also inherits methods from its parent, `MDCardComponent`.

name | params | desc
--- | --- | ---
`showModal` |  | Shows the sheet as a modal.
`show` |  | Shows the sheet.
`close` |  | Closes the sheet.
`toggle` | `args` | Toggles the sheet visibility.

store:
# MDStore
MDStore provides CRUD operations and advanced querying capabilities for an array of documents.

## Constructor
Creates an instance of MDStore.

name | type | desc
--- | --- | --- 
`docs` | `Array` | Initial array of documents.
`options` | `Object` | Options for configuring the store.
`options.primaryKey` | `string` | Primary key field used for document identification.



## Instance methods
name | params | desc
--- | --- | ---
`post` | `doc` | Adds a new document to the store.
`get` | `_id` | Retrieves a document by its primary key.
`patch` | `_id`,`doc` | Updates a document by its primary key.
`delete` | `_id` | Deletes a document by its primary key.
`put` | `doc` | Adds or updates a document based on its primary key.
`getAll` | `options` | Retrieves all documents from the store based on query options.

virtual:
# MDVirtualController
MDVirtualController manages virtual scrolling and emits events related to scroll changes.

## Constructor
Creates an instance of MDVirtualController.

name | type | desc
--- | --- | --- 
`host` | `HTMLElement` | The host element to which the controller is attached.
`options` | `Object` | Options for configuring the virtual controller.
`options.viewportSelector` | `string` | Selector for the viewport element.
`options.scrollbarSelector` | `string` | Selector for the scrollbar element.
`options.containerSelector` | `string` | Selector for the container element.
`options.rowSelector` | `string`,`null` | Selector for identifying rows within the container.
`options.columnSelector` | `string`,`null` | Selector for identifying columns within the container.
`options.rowTotal` | `number` | Total number of rows.
`options.rowHeight` | `number` | Height of each row.
`options.buffer` | `number` | Buffer size for rows.
`options.rowBuffer` | `number` | Buffer size specifically for rows.
`options.columnTotal` | `number` | Total number of columns.
`options.columnWidth` | `number` | Width of each column.
`options.columnBuffer` | `number` | Buffer size for columns.

## Events
Listen to these events using `addEventListener()`, or by assigning an event listener to the `@onEventName` property of this interface.

name | desc
--- | ---
`onVirtualScrollChange` | Triggered when the virtual scroll range changes.
`onVirtualScroll` | Triggered on every virtual scroll event.
